mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room_info WHERE publisher_type = #{publisherType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM room_info WHERE publisher_id = #{publisherId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM room_info WHERE review_status = #{reviewStatus} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM room_info WHERE review_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM room_info WHERE publisher_type = 2 AND publisher_id = #{landlordId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
